text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text: This is a coincidence. Out for an evening stroll? I, too, am—
choice_data_list: You don't look like you're just out for a stroll.
You don't look like you're just out for a stroll.

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text: That's, well...

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text: N-no, never! I'm the miracle worker! I would never...

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text: Ah, ahem... Excuse me. I didn't mean to raise my voice.

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text: Sigh... How quick I am to lose my composure upon being exposed. I still have much to learn.

Smiling at her own consternation, Fuji Kiseki takes a deep breath and
quietly continues.

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text: The tryouts are special.

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
They're a momentous event where runners who've risen to racer status
take their first definitive steps toward entering the Twinkle Series.

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
Make no mistake, it's a far cry from the scrimmage the other day. At
tryouts, the expectations are as high as the level of each superb
runner.

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text: But me? I'm still not...

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
Trainer, from what you've seen, what do you think of me? Did I
succeed in my performance as a naturally talented and confident Fuji
Kiseki?

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text: Then I'm glad. I hope to always be capable of that.

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text: But... the truth is, I still lack many skills.

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
Today's incident is proof. If I'd been keeping a proper eye out, as I
should've been, that student never would have run away.

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
I... I know I should be resting, but when I think about tomorrow... I
can't fathom the thought of sleeping as if everything's fine.

Fuji Kiseki's fallen into deep anxiety, making me realize she'll
continue to strain herself so long as she can't shake this dread.

I don't know how to make her feel better... What would be the best
way to raise the spirits of an aspiring entertainer?

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
So long as there are people hoping for a miraculous race, it is this
entertainer's mission to give them a show to remember.

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text: Huh? What is it?
choice_data_list: I know what to do! Just stay here!
I know what to do! Just stay here!

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text: What? Where—wait, Trainer!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text: Ah, it's you! That look in your eyes... You found Fuji, didn't ya?!
choice_data_list: Yeah, but I need your help.
Yeah, but I need your help.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text: Huh? With what?
choice_data_list: We're going to make her feel better.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text: Hmmm... All right, lemme hear the plan.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I explain the situation to Hishi Amazon, who graciously answers my
call for assistance. That's when we get to work.

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text: Ah, Trainer! What could you be—huh?!

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text: What is everyone doing here?!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
Nothin' special. This trainer here asked us to come give you a little
support for your tryout race.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
And these kiddos... Too curious for their own good. I told 'em it's
after curfew, but they wouldn't have it.

text_block_list.name: Biko Pegasus
text_block_list.text:
We heard you were doing supersecret drills! So that's how you're so
good! And you're always coming to our rescue too—just like a hero!

text_block_list.name: Biko Pegasus
text_block_list.text:
That's why tomorrow we're going to be on the sidelines cheering for
your victory, just like in those superhero shows!

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text: And me too! Your races are always the funnest to watch! I can't wait to cheer you on!

text_block_list.name: Junior Students
text_block_list.text:
Go, Fuji! You can do it!
You're the best, Fuji!

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text: I don't know what to say...
choice_data_list: We all believe in your miracles.
We all believe in your miracles.

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text: My miracles...
choice_data_list: Now it's time for you to believe in them too.
Now it's time for you to believe in them too.

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text: Hahaha... You really got me there, Trainer.

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
I would never dream of letting down all the younger kids. And... I
never will.

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text: So I'm going to smile, stand tall, and... go home.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Our efforts pay off, and Fuji Kiseki finally decides to return to her
dorm room and get some rest.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
No sooner than I can blink, the next morning arrives, meaning it's time
for the tryouts at last.

text_block_list.name: Caster
text_block_list.text:
They're round the third corner! Coming from far outside is... the Black
Meteor, Fuji Kiseki! She makes up for her slow start in an instant!

text_block_list.name: Junior Students
text_block_list.text: Go for it, Fujiii!

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
(Fears still lie within me—I can feel them. I have much to improve on
if I ever want to live up to my name... In the end, I'm still an amateur.)

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
(But! Look at this crowd! I'm in front of a live audience! I will always
be proud to be an entertainer—and I will show that to them, right
here and now!)

text_block_list.name: Caster
text_block_list.text:
Fuji Kiseki has the lead into the final stretch! She's a whopping eight
lengths ahead of second! What a whirlwind of a solo show!

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
(Forget the fatigue! Show them you've got enough left to smile! That's
what Fuji Kiseki would do! Now, all that's left is the big finish!)

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text: This... is my MIRACLE!

text_block_list.name: Caster
text_block_list.text:
And Fuji Kiseki takes fiiirst! The crowd is roaring with applause for
that astounding performance!

text_block_list.name: Junior Runner C
text_block_list.text:
Fuji Kiseki... Thank you so much for that amazing race. I remember
now... my motivation—and my dream!

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
Phew... I'm completely exhausted. You know, I'm a bit of a stranger
when it comes to muscle soreness, but this time I'm afraid of what
tomorrow will bring.
choice_data_list: Good job out there. That was a real miracle.
Good job out there. That was a real miracle.

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text: Heehee, that makes me happy!

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
It's the job of an entertainer to live up to the audience's expectations.
That's what I thought, at least...

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
But at the same time, I learned that their expectations are what give
me the greatest strength of all. I just wanted to say... thank you for
teaching me that.

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text: Trainer, if you're willing... would you continue to teach me?

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
With you, I feel I can show everyone a miracle even grander than the
one I demonstrated today!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I instantly sign a contract with Fuji Kiseki, the miraculous entertainer
who brings joy to all!
